title: betula × aurata
intro: Betula × aurata, also known as the golden birch or hybrid birch, is a hybrid plant species resulting from the cross between the river birch (Betula nana) and paper birch (Betula papyrifera). It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating wounds, skin conditions, and infections. The health benefits of Betula × aurata include reducing fever, alleviating rheumatism, and soothing digestive issues, making it a popular herbal remedy. Betula × aurata can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
